KVB Platinum Credit Card
Platinum Credit Card issued to Individuals for meeting their general/personal expense.
Apply Now
500 bonus
Reward points on card activation
Fuel
Surcharge waiver
2x rewards
Domestic and International travels, hotels and air tickets
Features & benefits Contactless transaction
Earn 2 reward points on every Rs 150 spent
1.5x rewards on Restaurants, medical, books, insurance, rail tickets, movie tickets & car rentals
Waiver of annual fees if the spends of previous year is more than Rs 1.00 lakhs
EMI conversion and Balance transfer
Periodical offers from VISA
Others Others Payment of Outstanding Dues Outstanding dues shall be remitted through Mobile Banking, Net Banking, NEFT/RTGS, Cash/Cheque payment at KVB Branches.
EMI Minimum transaction amount of Rs 500 and maximum of total credit limit shall be converted to EMI at the rate of 15% to 22% depending on the relationship vintage of the customer.
Balance Transfer Minimum transaction amount of Rs 10000 and maximum of total credit limit shall be applicable for balance transfer at the rate of 18%
Contactless Contactless transactions are allowed up to the maximum limit stipulated by RBI. At present the maximum limit allowed is Rs 5000
Credit card Limit Min Rs 0.25 Lakhs; Maximum Rs.5.00 lakhs
Auto Debit Either Total Amount Due (TAD) or Minimum Amount Due (MAD) are accepted. The linked accounts will be auto debited only once on the due dates as given above.
Finance Charges 3.25% per Month; 39% P.A
Interest Free Grace Period Maximum of upto 45 days. All charges incurred by the use of the Card and all the charges applicable to the Card shall be paid within 15 days from the bill generation date.
Validity of the card 5 years from the date of issuance of the card subject to fulfillment of the banks eligibility criteria.
Primary Security Nil.(option for secured card against FD available)
Billing statements Credit Card holders shall be billed on a monthly basis as per the billing cycle mentioned above for all the purchases and charges incurred by the use of the Card and for all charges applicable to the card account. The billing statement will be mailed on monthly basis to the registered E-Mail ID of the customer.
Minimum amount due 5 % of Total Outstanding (Min of Rs.200/-) + all applicable taxes + EMI (In case of EMI based product) + Over limit amount (if any). The total amount mentioned above will reflect as Minimum Amount Due in the statement.
Interest free grace period Upto 45 days
Joining fee Free
Annual fee Rs.599.00/card
Card Replacement fee Rs.199/- (Waived for Fraudulent transaction, reissue on Expiry)
Add on card fee Free
Cash withdrawal 2% of the cash withdrawn or Rs 300. (Whichever is higher)
Late Payment charges Outstanding amount between 200-500 Rs.100/-
501-2500 Rs.300/-
2501-10000 Rs.500/-
10001 -25000 Rs.800/-
25001 and above Rs.1000/-
Charges on over limit 2.5% on over limit amount, subject to minimum of Rs.500/-
Payment (cheque/ECS/NACH) return Rs 500/-
Cash processing fee Rs.100.00 (for all cash deposits made through KVB Branches)
Petrol Transaction Surcharge 1% of transaction value. Waiver: For single transaction spends between Rs.500 and Rs.4000. Maximum of Rs.200/- for one billing cycle
Foreign Currency Mark up of 3.5% will be charged on Foreign Currency transactions
Goods & Service Tax(GST) Applicable on all fees, interest and other charges.
EMI/BT processing charges Rs 300 or 1% of the loan amount (Whichever is higher)
EMI/BT foreclosure charges 3% on the principle outstanding
Reward Redemption Fee Rs.99/- per redemption request (Minimum 2000 reward points are required for first redemption, there after 250 reward points required for subsequent redemptions), Unclaimed reward points will be lapsed once in 3 years or if Minimum Amount Due (MAD) is not paid more than 60 days

Apply Now

on airline, hotel, dining and luxury shopping spends
10000 Bonus
Reward points on card activation
Zero Foreign
currency markup on international transactions
Features & benefits Base Rewards: 2 Reward Points (RP) for every ₹100 spent.
Accelerated Rewards: Earn 3X Reward Points on airline, hotel, dining, and luxury shopping spends.
Reward Redemption: 1 Reward Point (RP) = ₹1.
Welcome Bonus: 10,000 Reward Points on card activation.
Welcome Benefits: One-night stay at Postcard Hotels, 1-year MindEscapes Concierge Club Access, 1-year EazyDiner Membership and 1-year Club Marriott Membership.
Enjoy 15% off on Business Class fares with Qatar Airways, Lufthansa on international routes and Air India on domestic routes.
Zero foreign currency markup on international transactions.
Others Others Credit card Limit Min 5 Lacs, Max 50.00 Lacs
Payment of Outstanding Dues Outstanding dues shall be remitted through Mobile Banking, Net Banking, NEFT/RTGS, Cash/Cheque payment at KVB Branches.
EMI Minimum transaction amount of Rs 500 and maximum of total credit limit shall be converted to EMI at the rate of 15% to 22% depending on the EMI tenor
Balance Transfer Not Available
Contactless Contactless transactions are allowed up to the maximum limit stipulated by RBI. At present the maximum limit allowed for PIN less contactless transaction is Rs 5000.00
Auto Debit Either Total Amount Due (TAD) or Minimum Amount Due (MAD) are accepted. The linked accounts will be auto debited only once on the due dates
Finance Charges 3% per month, 36% per annum
Interest free grace period Maximum of upto 45 days. All charges incurred by the use of the Card and all the charges applicable to the Card shall be paid within 15 days from the bill generation date.
Validity of the card 5 years from the date of issuance of the card subject to fulfillment of the banks eligibility criteria.
Billing statements Credit Card holders shall be billed on a monthly basis as per the billing cycle mentioned above for all the purchases and charges incurred by the use of the Card and for all charges applicable to the card account. The billing statement will be mailed on monthly basis to the registered E-Mail ID of the customer.
Minimum amount due 5% of Total Outstanding + all applicable taxes + EMI (in case of EMI based product) + Over Limit amount (if any). It will reflect as Minimum Amount Due in the statement
Joining fee 29,999/- plus applicable GST
Annual fee 29,999/- plus applicable GST
Card Replacement fee Rs.3999/- plus applicable GST (Waived for Fraudulent transaction, reissue on Expiry)
Cash withdrawal 2% of the cash withdrawn or Rs 300. (Whichever is higher)
Late Payment charges Outstanding amount between 200-500 Rs.100/-
501-2500 Rs.300/-
2501-10000 Rs.500/-
10001 -25000 Rs.800/-
25001 and above Rs.1000/-
Charges on over limit 2.5% on over limit amount, subject to minimum of Rs.500/-
Payment (cheque/ECS/NACH) return 500/-
Petrol Transaction Surcharge 1% of transaction value. Waiver: For single transaction spends between Rs.500 and Rs.4000. Maximum of Rs.200/- for one billing cycle
Foreign Currency NIL
EMI/BT processing charges 1% of the EMI Principal, Min 300/-
EMI/BT foreclosure charges 3% of the Principal outstanding
Reward Redemption Fee Rs.99/- per redemption request (Minimum 2000 reward points are required for first redemption, there after 250 reward points required for subsequent redemptions), Unclaimed reward points will be lapsed once in 3 years or if Minimum Amount Due (MAD) is not paid more than 60 days
